data.title: Binance Wallet will soon launch FHE exclusive TGE
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Wallet will launch FHE TGE from 19:00 to 20:00 on April 10th, Beijing time.
Participation qualifications: To be eligible, participants must maintain at least $100 in asset value in their Binance account every day for 7 consecutive days before the start date of the TGE. You can check your qualifications on the PancakeSwap TGE event page.
Snapshot time period: 23:59:59 (UTC) on April 3, 2025 to 23:59:59 (UTC) on April 9, 2025
Snapshot statistical assets include:
Assets in Binance wallet (keyless wallet): including tokens and Alpha tokens supported by Binance spot, but excluding LSD type tokens;
Assets in Binance exchange accounts.
Example:
User A has a daily asset value of 50 USD in Binance wallet (keyless) and a daily asset value of 50 USD in Binance exchange account for 7 consecutive days before TGE. He/she is eligible.
User B has a daily asset value of 100 USD in Binance wallet (keyless) and a daily asset value of 0 USD in Binance exchange account for 7 consecutive days before TGE. He/she is eligible.
User C has a daily asset value of 0 USD in Binance wallet (keyless) and a daily asset value of 100 USD in Binance exchange account for 7 consecutive days before TGE. He/she is eligible.
Important: Binance reserves the right to modify the event rules and eligibility criteria at any time without prior notice. All interpretation rights of the rules belong to Binance. Participants are strongly advised to confirm the latest rules through official channels before participating.

data.title: U.S. Stock Futures Experience Significant Decline
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. stock futures saw a notable decline with the Nasdaq futures dropping over 2%. The S&P 500 futures decreased by 1.7%, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average futures fell by 1.2%. This downturn reflects growing concerns in the market.

data.title: Cryptocurrency exchange platform coins generally rose, GT rose 5.8%, BNB rose 4.1%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coingecko data shows that crypto exchange platform coins generally rose, GT rose 5.8% in 24 hours, BNB rose 4.1% in 24 hours, and OKB rose 4.4% in 24 hours. In addition, according to the real-time data of the 90-day increase of the top 100 altcoins released by CMC, GT was 21.17% and OKB was 13.25%.

data.title: Binance will adjust the settlement frequency of TROY and GAS perpetual contract funding rates
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will adjust the funding rate settlement frequency of USDⓈ-MTROYUSDT and GASUSDT perpetual contracts from every 4 hours to every 2 hours starting from 08:00 (UTC) on April 10, 2025. The upper limit of the funding rate after adjustment is +2.00%/-2.00%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: OpenAI Files Countersuit Against Elon Musk Over Alleged Disruption
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, OpenAI has filed a countersuit against Elon Musk, accusing him of deliberately disrupting the company's operations through media attacks, inciting followers, and false acquisition attempts. The lawsuit seeks a federal judge's intervention to prevent Musk from engaging in further illegal and unfair actions against OpenAI, including media attacks and malicious publicity.

Previously, Musk had sued OpenAI and its CEO Sam Altman, alleging that OpenAI initially invited him to fund a nonprofit AI research organization aimed at benefiting humanity, but has since shifted its focus to profit.

data.title: China Criticizes U.S. Tariff Policy as Harmful to Global Trade
data.description: According to PANews, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Lin Jian criticized the United States for imposing a 125% tariff on Chinese goods. Lin stated that the U.S. is using tariffs as a tool for extreme pressure, which serves its own interests while severely infringing on the legitimate rights of other countries. This action, Lin argued, violates World Trade Organization rules and undermines the multilateral trading system, posing a threat to the global economic order. Lin emphasized that the U.S. actions are tantamount to confronting the entire world.

data.title: CMC Altcoin Season Index Stands at 15, Reflecting a Weakening Altcoin Trend
data.description: According to CoinMarketCap (CMC) data, the CMC Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 15. The index measures market performance by analyzing the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization to determine whether the market is shifting towards altcoins or Bitcoin dominance.

data.title: The Ministry of Foreign Affairs responded to the US's 125% tariff increase on China: China does not want to fight a tariff war, but is not afraid of it
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Regarding the US announcement of a 125% tariff on China, Foreign Ministry spokesman Lin Jian said that the US, out of its own selfishness, used tariffs as a weapon to exert extreme pressure and seek private interests, which seriously infringed upon the legitimate rights and interests of various countries, seriously violated the rules of the World Trade Organization, seriously damaged the rules-based multilateral trading system, and seriously impacted the stability of the global economic order. This is a blatant defiance of the world and against the entire world. I want to emphasize again that there are no winners in tariff wars and trade wars. China does not want to fight, but it is not afraid of fighting. We will never sit idly by and watch the legitimate rights and interests of the Chinese people being deprived, and we will never sit idly by and watch international economic and trade rules and the multilateral trading system being destroyed. If the US insists on fighting a tariff war and a trade war, China will fight to the end. The US puts its own interests above the public interests of the international community and serves the hegemonic interests of the United States at the expense of the legitimate interests of countries around the world. It will inevitably be more strongly opposed by the international community. (Jin Shi)
